gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل موقو ف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/188)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل موقو ف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/188)
text: الْمُبَاهَلَةِ قَالَ تُشَبِّكُ أَصَابِعَكَ فِي أَصَابِعِهِ ثُمَّ تَقُولُ اللَّهُمَّ إِنْ كَانَ فُلَانٌ جَحَدَ حَقّاً وَ أَقَرَّ بِبَاطِلٍ فَأَصِبْهُ بِحُسْبَانٍ مِنَ السَّمَاءِ أَوْ بِعَذَابٍ مِنْ عِنْدِكَ وَ تُلَاعِنُهُ سَبْعِينَ مَرَّةً .

en.hubeali: Ahmad, from one of our companions,

‘Regarding the imprecation, he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Intertwine your fingers into his fingers, then you should be saying, O Allah<sup>azwj</sup>! If it was so that so and so has denied a truth and acknowledge with a falsehood, so either Hit him by a thunderbolt from the sky or with a Punishment from Your<sup>azwj</sup> Presence’, and you should curse him seventy times’.
en.sarwar: 3. Ahmad has narrated from certain individuals of our people about al-Mubahalah this: “Crisscross the fingers of your hand with his fingers and say, ‘O Lord, if so and so has rejected a truth or has professed a falsehood, make him suffer misfortune from the sky or a painful punishment by Your command and then (the parties) renounce each other seventy times.’”
